global_description: A medium-sized bird with a sleek, elongated body. Predominantly vibrant green plumage with striking blue and black accents. The bird has a long tail and a stout, slightly curved beak. Its feathers are smooth and glossy.

part_details.head: Bright blue with a black mask around the eyes
part_details.wings: Blue with green edges, sleek and pointed
part_details.body: Elongated, covered in vibrant green feathers

spatial_relations: The blue wings are attached to the sides of the green body
The long tail extends from the rear of the body
The black mask surrounds the eyes on the blue head
